nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as content creator replacing personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I usually use it to get ideas for social media posts and edit/refine marketing copy

nodes.label: AI for clarity and conciseness in writing
nodes.label_negative: AI for generic or cliche content
nodes.grounding_span: Conciseness and clarity! I am very wordy and my thoughts can get lost in the fluff, so AI helps me make my content more succinct and easy to read.

nodes.label: Preservation of unique voice and empathy
nodes.label_negative: Reliance on AI for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't create generic content and a big part of my brand is my unique voice, empathy, and insights.

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that degrades writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think it's negatively impacting my writing skills - I write prose here and there in my free time - but it helps elevate my level of concise communication

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: a big part of my brand is my unique voice, empathy, and insights

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: Conciseness and clarity! I am very wordy and my thoughts can get lost in the fluff

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: the time spent writing is much less

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: I love the ability to edit and refine what I've created from a writing perspective

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: I usually have my own ideas and find those suggestions unhelpful

nodes.label: Intent to maintain balanced AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely don't want to over-rely on it! I still keep a fair balance

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: It's like AI gets things going, I implement in my way, then take it back to AI to polish it up.

nodes.label: Selective delegation — prefers AI for content creation, retains control over structure
nodes.grounding_span: I like to deal with the details of the content I'm creating. I like the suggestions AI gives to get the juices flowing.
